text: Artificial intelligence is transforming our world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias, which occurs when AI systems reflect the prejudices present in their training data. This can lead to unfair outcomes, particularly for already marginalized groups, so ensuring fairness is essential. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often relies on large amounts of personal data. Developers must protect this information and use it responsibly. Transparency also matters: people should understand how AI makes decisions. Ultimately, responsible AI development means creating systems that are ethical by design, considering these issues from the start to build trust and benefit everyone.
